followup_options.label: Manual UI walkthrough
followup_options.description: Run the app and verify behaviors manually with observed evidence.

followup_options.description: Use a browser capability adapter to run click/type/observe checks.

followup_options.description: Run narrow executable checks that validate key acceptance criteria.
